rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in annex blocks and follow AADL scope rules for component references
Validator diagnostics pointing to implementation-level references in type annexes should be resolved by moving valid bindings to implementation annexes or removing invalid guarantees
generic_rules: Only use visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes to avoid scope errors
Do not introduce package-qualified names or types not present in the input model
Fix root unresolved references instead of adding new architecture when AGREE reports type errors
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings belong in implementation annexes, not type annexes
anti_patterns: Adding architecture elements or references that are not visible in the current AADL scope
Attempting to encode AADL property associations as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about empty packages
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
